title: Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Haryana

overview.short: Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in the Kosli Subdivision of Rewari district of Haryana, India.
overview.description: Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in the Kosli Subdivision of Rewari district of Haryana, India. It is 36.9 km from Rewari. It is spread over an area of 211.35 hectares. It is 5 km away from Kosli on the Kosli-Mahendragarh road.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nahar Block of Rewari
topPlaces.description: Nahar Block consists of 46 Gram Panchayats and 49 Villages. Its pincode number is 123303.

topPlaces.name: Bishoha
topPlaces.description: Bisoha is a village situated on an approach road at a distance 1.5 km from Lookhi village on Kanina-Kosli road in Rewari district.

topPlaces.name: Lookhi
topPlaces.description: Lookhi, formerly known as Lakhipur, is a village in Kosli Tehsil, Rewari district, Haryana, India. It is located on the Kosli–Kanina road and is equidistant from both cities.

topPlaces.name: Lilodh
topPlaces.description: Lilodh is a village in Kosli tehsil, Rewari district in the state of Haryana, India. It is known for being the birthplace of many members of the Indian Armed Forces.

topPlaces.name: Karoli, Rewari
topPlaces.description: Karoli is a village located in Kosli Tehsil, Rewari District, Haryana, India. It is on the 1.5-kilometre approach road boarded to Bahu-Jholri on the Kosli–Kanina road and is 12 kilometres from Kosli and 7 kilometres from Kanina.

topPlaces.name: Bhakli
topPlaces.description: Bhakli is a village in the Kosli sub-division of Rewari district of Haryana in India. It is situated 80 kilometers from Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Patauda
topPlaces.description: Patauda is a village of Jhajjar District in the Indian state of Haryana located in the south of National Capital Territory of Delhi, 78 kilometres south of New Delhi and 12 kilometres from Pataudi.There is one more village called Patauda Khera is also under the Patauda panchayat. Majority are Ahir community.

topPlaces.name: Baba Thakur
topPlaces.description: Baba Thakur is a temple dedicated to Krishna in Karoli village of Kosli tehsil of Rewari district in Haryana state of India. "Thakur" is another name of Krishna.

Lilodh is a village in Kosli tehsil, Rewari district in the state of Haryana, India. It is known for being the birthplace of many members of the Indian Armed Forces.

Karoli is a village located in Kosli Tehsil, Rewari District, Haryana, India. It is on the 1.5-kilometre approach road boarded to Bahu-Jholri on the Kosli–Kanina road and is 12 kilometres from Kosli and 7 kilometres from Kanina.
Bhakli is a village in the Kosli sub-division of Rewari district of Haryana in India. It is situated 80 kilometers from Delhi.

Patauda is a village of Jhajjar District in the Indian state of Haryana located in the south of National Capital Territory of Delhi, 78 kilometres south of New Delhi and 12 kilometres from Pataudi.There is one more village called Patauda Khera is also under the Patauda panchayat. Majority are Ahir community.
Baba Thakur is a temple dedicated to Krishna in Karoli village of Kosli tehsil of Rewari district in Haryana state of India. "Thakur" is another name of Krishna.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (71 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nahar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nahar Block of Rewari, Bishoha, Lookhi, Lilodh, Karoli, Rewari.
